parameters.name: upload_id
parameters.description: Optional ID to track upload progress

files.description: One or more files to upload

200.description: List of file paths where the uploaded files were saved

400.description: Invalid content type or invalid file name

post.summary: Analyze a video (or optional image) with a text prompt using MOSS-VL-Realtime. Streams partial results frame-by-frame to reflect the model's realtime perception: the video is fed in as a sequence of timestamped frames and the answer is progressively updated as more of the stream is observed.. File inputs must first be uploaded via POST /gradio_api/upload (multipart/form-data with a "files" field). Use the returned path in the request body as {"path": "<uploaded_path>", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}.
post.description: Analyze a video (or optional image) with a text prompt using MOSS-VL-Realtime. Streams partial results frame-by-frame to reflect the model's realtime perception: the video is fed in as a sequence of timestamped frames and the answer is progressively updated as more of the stream is observed.Output must be fetched from GET /gradio_api/call/analyze/{event_id}. Returns an array of 2 elements of the following format: ["output ({'type': 'string'})", "output_1 ({'type': {}, 'description': 'any valid json'})"]

video.description: Must include {"path": "url", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}. The meta key signals that the file will be uploaded to the remote server.

image.description: Must include {"path": "url", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}. The meta key signals that the file will be uploaded to the remote server.

get.description: Returns a stream of server-sent events (SSE). The final event has `event: complete` with `data` containing a JSON array of outputs.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event_id returned by the POST request

200.description: SSE stream with event: complete containing a JSON array of outputs

Streams partial results frame-by-frame to reflect the model's realtime perception: the video is fed in as a sequence of timestamped frames and the answer is progressively updated as more of the stream is observed.Output must be fetched from GET /gradio_api/call/analyze_submit/{event_id}. Returns an array of 2 elements of the following format: ["output ({'type': 'string'})", "output_1 ({'type': {}, 'description': 'any valid json'})"]

video.description: Must include {"path": "url", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}. The meta key signals that the file will be uploaded to the remote server.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event_id returned by the POST request

200.description: SSE stream with event: complete containing a JSON array of outputs
